description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a bald head and light skin, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a short-sleeved, loose-fitting shirt and knee-length shorts, both of which have a simple, unadorned design. The figure's facial features are basic, with prominent eyes and a neutral expression. His legs are straight, and he wears low-cut shoes that appear practical for walking. The overall proportions are slightly exaggerated, giving the figure a cartoon-like appearance. The surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with minimal textural detail.
description: A stylized adult male figure in a T-pose, wearing a short-sleeved shirt, knee-length shorts, and low-cut shoes, with a bald head and simple facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full arm span, with clear visibility of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and shorts, with arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head and body, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
